title: GetUserDefinedFunctionsRequest
description: GetUserDefinedFunctionsRequest schema from Amazon Glue API

allOf.description: The ID of the Data Catalog where the functions to be retrieved are located. If none is provided, the Amazon Web Services account ID is used by default.
The name of the catalog database where the functions are located. If none is provided, functions from all the databases across the catalog will be returned.
An optional function-name pattern string that filters the function definitions returned.
A continuation token, if this is a continuation call.
The maximum number of functions to return in one response.
